title: Text Box
description: A component that provides a single-line text input field with various features like validation, masking, and formatting.

sections.title: Using Decorators
sections.description: Example of text box with decorators (prefix/suffix)

sections.title: Number Mode
sections.description: Example of text box in number input mode

props.name: maskOptions
props.description: Configuration options for the mask feature

props.name: type
props.description: HTML input type (text, password, email, etc.)

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Autocomplete attribute for the input field

props.name: classNames
props.description: CSS classes to apply to the component

props.name: value
props.description: The current value of the text box. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the text box is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the text box is read-only. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: The tab index for keyboard navigation. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute of the input field. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: The validation state of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: allowNull
props.description: Whether null values are allowed. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onKeyDown
events.description: Fires each time the user presses a key down. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyUp
events.description: Fires each time the user releases a key. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyPress
events.description: Fires each time the user presses a key. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onTextChanged
events.description: Fires each time the user changes the text. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Fires each time the value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Emitted when the value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the validation state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the component loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the component gains focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look property changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Registers a callback function to be called when the component is touched.
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Registers a change callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnChange(fn: (value: string) => void): void

/**
 * Writes a value to the component (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param value - The value to write.
 */
writeValue(value: string): void

/**
 * Commits a value with optional user interaction flag.
 *
 * @param value - The value to commit.
 * @param u - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
commitValue(value: string, u?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets the component value.
 *
 * @param e - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
reset(e?: boolean): void

/**
 * Validates the component.
 *
 * @returns Promise<AXValidationSummary> - Validation result.
 */
validate(): Promise<AXValidationSummary>

/**
 * Adds a validation rule.
 *
 * @param rule - The validation rule to add.
 */
addValidationRule(rule: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Removes a validation rule.
 *
 * @param ruleToRemove - The validation rule to remove.
 */
removeValidationRule(ruleToRemove: AXFormValidationRule): void
